name: Cut My Candy
description: Cut My Candy is a dark fantasy physics puzzle game where your goal is to feed a hungry demon! Swipe to cut ropes and watch the candy swing, fall, and bounce based on real-world physics. Navigate through 25 challenging, hand-crafted puzzle chambers filled with dangerous spikes, floating bubbles, and tricky momentum swings. Plan your cuts carefully to collect all 3 stars in each level before guiding the candy into the demons mouth. Can you master the physics and conquer all 25 levels?
instructions: Mouse or Touch Click tap and swipe across a rope to cut it Tap on bubbles to pop them and release the candy
